zh.lifeSummary: 當Ralph de Eyncourt於大約1102年出生在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾林肯時，他的父親Ralph de Eyncourt32歲，母親Basilie of Nottinghamshire14歲。他和Basilia de Lincoln至少有1個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於1181年在英國蘇格蘭Comhairle nan Eilean Siar帕克享年80歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Ralph
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

variants.name: Ralf
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

en.lifeSummary: When Ralph de Eyncourt was born about 1102, in Lincoln, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Ralph de Eyncourt, was 32 and his mother, Basilie of Nottinghamshire, was 14. He had at least 1 son and 1 daughter with Basilia de Lincoln. He died in 1181, in Park, Comhairle nan Eilean Siar, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 80.

Il a eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille avec Basilia de Lincoln. Il est décédé en 1181, à Park, Comhairle nan Eilean Siar, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 80 ans.

Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia con Basilia de Lincoln. Morì nel 1181, nel Park, Comhairle nan Eilean Siar, Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 80 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Ralph de Eyncourtが約1102年にイギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアリンコルンで生まれた時，父Ralph de Eyncourtは32歳，母Basilie of Nottinghamshireは14歳であった。彼はBasilia de Lincolnとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1181年にイギリススコットランドComhairle nan Eilean Siarパークで80歳で死去した。

ko.Park Hall, Morton, Derbyshire, England: 영국 스코틀랜드 Comhairle nan Eilean Siar 박
ko.lifeSummary: Ralph de Eyncourt(이)가 대략 1102년 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 링코컨에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Ralph de Eyncourt(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Basilie of Nottinghamshire(은)는 14세였다. 그는 Basilia de Lincoln(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1181년 영국 스코틀랜드 Comhairle nan Eilean Siar 박에서 80세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ralph de Eyncourt родился около 1102 г. в местности линколн, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Ralph de Eyncourt было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Basilie of Nottinghamshire, 14. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь от Basilia de Lincoln. Он умер в 1181 г. в местности парк, Comhairle nan Eilean Siar, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 80 лет.
